news.headline: James M. Black II selected as observer for Moldova's presidential election and EU referendum on Oct 20, 2024.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, James M. Black II, an attorney specializing in Corporate & Securities law and serving as General Counsel at Falcon Rappaport & Berkman (FRB) in New York, has been chosen as an election observer for Moldova's forthcoming presidential election and EU referendum. The crucial events are scheduled to unfold on October 20, 2024.

news.headline: Fed's Bostic: In my outlook, interest rates will continue to fall.
Hikvision becomes first in LED display industry to earn TÜV Rheinland Green Product Mark with 16 products.
news.summary: Hangzhou-based company Hikvision recently revealed that 16 of its LED display products have been awarded the Green Product Mark certification from TÜV Rheinland. This marks a significant milestone as Hikvision becomes the first in the LED display sector to achieve this recognition. The announcement was made on October 18, 2024, showcasing the company's commitment to environmentally friendly practices.

news.headline: Bitcoin nears $69,000, trader predicts potential breakout with $70,000 level key, bullish outlook based on technical analysis.
news.summary: Crypto trader Cold Blooded Shiller expressed optimism regarding Bitcoin's future prospects, citing technical analysis and market sentiment as crucial elements in a potential upward trend. In a recent YouTube update, Shiller highlighted Bitcoin's recent price movements, particularly the formation of higher highs and higher lows on extended timeframes. He emphasized the significance of this uptrend structure, noting that it is a first for Bitcoin in higher timeframes. Bitcoin's current challenge lies in breaching the $67,000-$68,000 resistance zone. Though not promising an immediate breakout, Shiller proposed that if Bitcoin manages to surpass the $70,000 mark, it could experience a swift rally.

news.headline: Binance exec's trial delayed as he misses Nigerian court hearing due to illness. #LetHimComeHome
news.summary: An executive from Binance named Tigran Gambaryan was unable to appear at a court hearing in Nigeria because of his poor health. This resulted in a delay in the proceedings.

news.headline: Israeli Broadcasting Authority: Prime Minister Netanyahu holds security consultations in light of the expected Israeli response to the Iran attack.
Global South Think Tanks Forum focuses on inclusive, equitable, prosperous world. Global South has 40% of global GDP and 85% of world's population.
news.summary: With approximately 85 percent of the world's population and contributing around 40 percent to the global GDP, the countries of the Global South are playing an increasingly significant role in global affairs. The upcoming annual summit of the BRICS nations in Kazan, Russia will address key issues pertinent to the region.

news.headline: French central bank governor expresses concern over eurozone inflation potentially falling below 2% target, advocating for adjustments in monetary policy. ECB recently cut interest rates by 25 basis points due to sluggish growth and inflation at 1.7%. Growth forecasts lowered to 0.7% in 2024 and 1.2% in 2025.
news.summary: The French central bank governor, François Villeroy de Galhau, highlighted the need for the European Central Bank (ECB) to adjust its monetary policy to prevent eurozone inflation from falling below its 2% target. The ECB recently lowered interest rates by 25 basis points to stimulate the economy after eurozone inflation dropped to 1.7% in September. Villeroy emphasized the importance of reducing monetary policy restrictions in a timely manner to address the risks posed by economic weakness, including sluggish growth in Germany. The ECB's focus has shifted towards encouraging economic growth, with a forecast of 0.7% GDP growth in 2024 and 1.2% in 2025. Villeroy suggested that additional cuts may be necessary to support the economy given the prevailing economic challenges.

news.headline: Cove Insurance Services now offers Commercial Property Insurance for California businesses, safeguarding assets from fire, theft, and disasters.
news.summary: Cove Insurance Services has recently broadened its range of services by introducing Commercial Property Insurance designed for businesses in California. This new offering aims to safeguard physical assets against various risks such as fire, theft, and natural disasters. Alongside this, Cove still provides Business Insurance for companies seeking comprehensive coverage. This expansion indicates Cove's commitment to meeting the insurance needs of Californian businesses and marks a significant development in their available services.

news.headline: Cargas partners with Acumatica to sell, implement, and support ERP software, announced in Lancaster on Oct. 18, 2024.
news.summary: Cargas announced a partnership with Acumatica on October 18, 2024. The collaboration aims to market, deploy, and maintain Acumatica's ERP software. Cargas, based in LANCASTER, Pa., will take on the role of selling Acumatica's business solutions. Acumatica is recognized as a key player in the ERP industry.

Fed's Bostic: The job on inflation is not done, we need to stay vigilant.
Kroger Health sets date for Nourishing Change Conference on Oct. 18, 2024, to address health and wellbeing issues.
news.summary: The Nourishing Change Conference is set to bring together healthcare leaders from various sectors to discuss nutrition security, care delivery, community well-being, and mental health. Scheduled for October 18, 2024, in Cincinnati, this event is organized by Kroger Health, a division of The Kroger Co. Stay tuned for innovative conversations on these vital topics with key industry figures.

Fed's Bostic: The Fed will act aggressively when inflation rises.
nVent Electric plc (NYSE: NVT) to release Q3 2024 results and host earnings call on November 1 at 9:00 a.m. ET. Results on website.
news.summary: nVent Electric plc (NYSE: NVT) will announce its third quarter 2024 financial results on Friday, November 1, 2024, and host a conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET for analysts and investors. The results will be accessible on the company's website at http://investors.nvent.com. An alert will be issued over a news wire when the earnings materials are released. nVent is a global leader in electrical connection and protection solutions.

news.summary: An individual named Chirag Tomar, who is a citizen of India, defrauded several unsuspecting customers of Coinbase by siphoning money from their accounts through fraudulent websites.

Fed's Bostic: I expect to get to 2% inflation near end of 2025.
ISS National Lab and NASA webinar will showcase research on SpaceX's next mission. Register now to ask questions. (Characters: 109)
news.summary: Don't miss the opportunity to participate in a webinar where researchers will be available to answer your questions. Scheduled for October 18, 2024, in Cape Canaveral, Florida, the International Space Station (ISS) National Laboratory and NASA will be hosting the event. The focus will be on upcoming research and technology development projects that will be launched aboard SpaceX's spacecraft. Be sure to register soon to secure your spot in this informative session.

TransCanyon LLC's Cross-Tie Project hits milestone with release of Final Environmental Impact Statement in SLC.
news.summary: A noteworthy achievement has been reached by TransCanyon's Cross-Tie Project in Salt Lake City with the release of the project's Final Environmental Impact Statement (FEIS). This milestone marks a crucial step forward in the project's development.

news.headline: BTY opens 9th US office in NYC. 1st in NY state, due to accelerating engagements.
news.summary: New York City - BTY recently unveiled its latest office in New York City on October 18, 2024. This expansion signifies the company's ninth branch in the U.S. and its inaugural location in the state of New York. BTY's move to enter the New York City market was influenced by various factors, including increasing opportunities and demand in the area.

news.headline: 52 counterparties take $259.892b at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.

EU's MiCA regulation mandates stablecoin issuers to hold EMI license from June 30, impacting 18% of global crypto volumes. Major exchanges like Coinbase and Binance adjust offerings to comply, as MiCA targets over 200 million potential users by year's end. CEO of Circle calls it a pivotal move towards mainstream digital currency acceptance.
news.summary: The EU's new crypto regulation, Markets in Crypto Assets (MiCA), requires stablecoin issuers to hold an Electronic Money Institution license by June 30. Exchanges are adapting to comply with the regulations to access a potential market of over 200 million people. MiCA is part of the EU's digital finance package to address crypto risks, applying to assets not covered by existing laws. Coinbase will delist stablecoins not complying with MiCA, while Binance will limit their availability for European users. PayPal launched its regulated stablecoin, PayPal USD (PYUSD), through Paxos. MiCA is seen as a significant step towards mainstream acceptance of digital currency by industry leaders.

news.headline: Dow Jones down, Apple rises on iPhone news, Netflix hits all-time high; Nasdaq outperforms with strong earnings.
news.summary: Today in the stock market, the Nasdaq composite stood out with a strong performance, boosted by impressive earnings results from Netflix and Intuitive Surgical. Despite a dip in the Dow Jones, Apple saw a significant increase following news about the iPhone. Netflix reached an all-time high, contributing to the market's activity for the day.

news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group advises insurers on selecting AI-enabled PAS to address industry challenges and meet customer needs.
news.summary: Info-Tech Research Group has released a new blueprint tailored to aid life and annuity insurers in overcoming the numerous challenges currently impacting the insurance sector. The blueprint offers vital advice on how to choose a policy administration system (PAS) that best fits the unique requirements of each organization. It emphasizes the importance of aligning the PAS with the operational needs of insurers to optimize efficiency and effectiveness. This guide includes valuable insights tailored specifically for the life and annuity insurance sector, ensuring that companies have the necessary tools to navigate the industry's complexities.

news.headline: Allegiant Air pilots represented by Teamsters Local 2118 rally for strong contract, threat of strike. Practice picket in Wisconsin, nationwide actions planned. Las Vegas, Oct. 18, 2024. (Numbers not provided)
news.summary: In Las Vegas on October 18, 2024, pilots from Teamsters Local 2118, representing Allegiant Air, held a practice picket at Appleton International Airport in Wisconsin. The pilots were advocating for a fair contract. This action is a precursor to nationwide demonstrations that are set to take place.

news.headline: Rocktop and One Diligence launched QCMaiven to solve complex fixed-income asset problems, leveraging Rocktop’s expertise.
news.summary: In Dallas, a new company called QCMaiven, specializing in AI technology, is leveraging Rocktop's successful history to tackle challenging issues in the fixed-income markets. These issues impact returns on various complex asset classes.

news.headline: "Ren partners with Janney Montgomery Scott to offer branded donor-advised fund solution, Oct. 18, 2024."
news.summary: Ren, a prominent provider of philanthropic solutions, has recently teamed up with Janney Montgomery Scott LLC, a top wealth management and investment banking company. This collaboration aims to introduce a branded donor-advised fund (DAF) to expand their services. The partnership signifies a significant step in the philanthropic sector, combining Ren's expertise with Janney Montgomery Scott LLC's established presence. This venture is set to bring a new dimension to charitable giving, enabling donors to make impactful contributions.

news.headline: Pacsun launches new F1 US Grand Prix Collection, celebrates partnership with Formula 1®. LA, Oct 18: /PRNewswire/ - Collection featured trackside for the second year.
news.summary: A popular youth retailer is excited to announce its ongoing collaboration with Formula 1® by introducing a new line of fashion inspired by motorsport for the upcoming race weekend. Pacsun revealed the debut of its latest F1 US Grand Prix Collection in Los Angeles on October 18, 2024. This collection will be showcased at the track for the second consecutive year, offering fans a chance to access trendy and race-inspired apparel during the exciting event.

news.headline: Paratus Energy Services Ltd. to hold Special General Meeting on Nov. 5, 2024, in Bermuda to appoint new members.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, in HAMILTON, Bermuda, Paratus Energy Services Ltd. announced that a Special General Meeting is scheduled for November 5, 2024. Shareholders will convene to vote on various agenda items, including the appointment of a new member.

news.headline: US hopeful for Gaza cease-fire, condemns killing of Hamas leader. #News #US #Gaza #ceasefire #Hamas
news.summary: The latest report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.5%, with over 1.5 million people currently without jobs. This marks a significant increase from the previous quarter. Additionally, the GDP growth forecast for the year has been revised to 2.3%, down from the initial projection of 3.1%. The government is taking steps to address these challenges and implement measures to stimulate economic growth and reduce unemployment.

news.headline: Southwest Airlines celebrates 100th concert in the sky with songwriter Liz Rose on Flight #1989 from Nashville to Miami.
news.summary: Passengers aboard Southwest Airlines Flight #1989 from Nashville to Miami on October 17 were treated to a unique performance showcasing the musical talents of Rose, featuring her hit song "All Too Well." The surprise concert, hosted by Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV), took place on the flight to Miami on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Payactiv wins 'Tech of the Future' award for financial wellness solution, enhancing economic mobility. MILPITAS, Calif., Oct. 18, 2024 - Payactiv recognized for championing financial security for millions. Leading provider of Earned Wage Access (EWA).
news.summary: Payactiv's financial wellness solution is being recognized by PayTech for its efforts in promoting economic mobility and boosting financial security for millions. The California-based company, Payactiv, Inc., a top provider of Earned Wage Access (EWA), has been praised for its impactful work in this field. The recognition was awarded on October 18, 2024, in Milpitas, California. This acknowledgment highlights the significant contributions that Payactiv has made to enhancing financial well-being and stability for a large number of individuals.

news.headline: KBRA report notes low prepayment rates in Solar Loan ABS due to rising rates, affecting sales & refinancing.
news.summary: In New York, a recent KBRA research report on solar loan ABS and prepayment rates noted a decline in prepayment speeds for mortgages and solar loans in 2023 and 2024 due to rising rates and ongoing home price appreciation. This trend was attributed to a slowdown in existing home sales and refinancing activities. The report highlighted that mortgage prepayment speeds reached cyclically low levels during this period. Solar loan prepayment rates also decreased alongside the decline in existing home sales, as these sales historically play a significant role in driving solar loan prepayments. Other factors impacting solar loan prepayments included Investment Tax Credit (ITC) proceeds.

US Baker Hughes Oil Rig Count Actual 482 (Forecast -, Previous 481)
GBS Malta, part of GEDU, inaugurates new San Ġiljan campus, revolutionizing student learning in Malta.
news.summary: In the heart of San Ġiljan, the vibrant city of Malta, GBS Malta, a part of Global Education (GEDU), has recently unveiled its state-of-the-art campus on October 18, 2024. The launch signifies a significant milestone in the realm of student education with a promising transformation in campus life. The Maltese Minister for Education, Youth, Research was present at the inauguration event.

news.headline: Op-ed highlights role of community colleges in Western NC's recovery post-Hurricane Helene. Published in Raleigh, N.C. on Oct. 18, 2024.
news.summary: Op-ed written by Jeff Cox, President of the North Carolina Community College System highlights the immediate response to Hurricane Helene in Raleigh, N.C. on October 18, 2024. In the wake of the destructive hurricane, numerous North Carolinians mobilized to assist, with first responders and volunteers stepping up to help save lives and support their communities. The proactive efforts of these individuals in the face of the crisis underlines the resilience and solidarity of the state, showcasing a commendable display of unity in times of need.

news.headline: Report by ResearchAndMarkets predicts growth opportunities in Grid-scale BESS industry by 2035, discussing capacity, investments, drivers, and trends.
news.summary: A report titled "Growth Opportunities for the Grid-scale Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) Industry" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The study offers a forecast and analysis at a regional level predicting the evolution of grid-scale BESS capacity and investments by 2035. It covers key drivers and restraints, supply and technology trends, business models, and use cases. The report also identifies growth opportunities for industry players. The global grid-scale BESS industry is expected to see significant growth and development in the coming years.

news.headline: Global Engine Group Holding Limited closed sale of 300,000 shares in IPO, raising $1.2M; total gross proceeds now $9.2M.
news.summary: Today, in Hong Kong,  Global Engine Group Holding Limited (GLE), an integrated solutions provider in information communication technologies, has announced the closure of the sale of an additional 300,000 ordinary shares at an IPO price of $4 per share. This follows the full exercise of the underwriter's over-allotment option, resulting in gross proceeds of $1,200,000 added to the previous IPO gross proceeds of $8,000,000, excluding underwriting discounts and offering expenses.

news.summary: Hackers were able to gain access to the hardware wallets of the long-term developers of a DeFi project and introduced malware into the system. The incident resulted in a significant breach of security, with approximately [insert number] wallets compromised. The developers are currently working to address the issue and are advising all users to take precautionary measures to secure their assets.
